case_title: ANGELIKA RYAN VS. SIDEMAN & BANKROFT, LLP

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED JUN-10-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SIDEMAN & BANKROFT, LLP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RYAN, ANGELIKA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIDEMAN & BANKROFT, LLP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RESPONSE SIDEMAN & BANCROFT AND DECLARATION OF MONICA MAZZEI IN OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF'S SMALL CLAIMS COURT CLAIM FILED BY DEFENDANT SIDEMAN & BANKROFT, LLP AS TO PLAINTIFF RYAN, ANGELIKA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-17-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-17-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MONICA MAZZEI--PARTNER/ATTORNEY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY RYAN, ANGELIKA AS TO DEFENDANT SIDEMAN & BANKROFT, LLP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO MONICA MAZZEI SIDEMAN & BANKROFT, LLP 1 EMBARCADERO 22ND FLR SF, CA 94111 (415) 392-1960
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SIDEMAN & BANKROFT, LLP
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RYAN, ANGELIKA AS TO DEFENDANT SIDEMAN & BANKROFT, LLP
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RYAN, ANGELIKA
